messages.content: 6:08. The phone's screen displays the time 6:08 with Wednesday, March 6, shown at the top.
what is opened in my application
The Camera application is opened in your phone. The screen shows a selfie view with a photo of yourself taken.

The image shows a young boy sitting in a bedroom. He has short dark hair and is wearing a red t-shirt with a white logo and white stripes on the sleeves. His hands are in front of him, possibly holding something. Behind him is a bed with a white comforter featuring blue and black squares. There are two doorways, one with a window and the other open to another room.
